programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 小姐不熙娣
programme.desc: 由娱乐圈最具女王气势之艺人小S徐熙娣主持，搭档幽默风趣的助理主持人派翠克，每集邀请多位时下最红、最具话题性之艺人及网红上节目，透过小S深厚及麻辣的主持功力，与现场来宾激荡出无敌之「笑果」。

programme.title: Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: Flower
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help her find a new place for her friend Isabelle the Sun-bell Daisy. This proves trickier than initially planned as Isabelle has some specific needs.

programme.title: I'm An Actual Ninja You Know
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: It's time to find a dinosaur
programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: The Big Day Out Badge
programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip.

programme.title: The Pen Pal Badge
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals.

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Tomatina Festival, Buñol, Spain
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: Festive Special
programme.desc: Carrot, Potato, Parsnip and Brussels Sprout perform the festive classic Auld Lang Syne.

programme.title: Tato Tower Sleepover
programme.desc: Supertato invites Evil Pea to his sleepover, but Carrot is suspicious and vows to stay up all night to make sure she can't unleash any of her evil plans.

programme.title: Trolley Dash
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: Washing
programme.desc: Po eats Tubby Custard and gets a messy bib. Po washes the bib clean and hangs it out to dry before eating more Tubby Custard with Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'shark' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of sharks! There's a pointy nosed shark and a big fin shark, a speedy shark and a grey and white shark.

programme.title: Slippery Messy
programme.desc: OKIDO is covered in ice, and Messy must find a way to melt it before it's too late.

programme.title: Pow Tao
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: Pass the Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Weather Prediction Predicament
programme.desc: There's a storm brewing after Glitch's fake weather report puts the cadets in danger.

programme.title: Bbq
programme.desc: It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

programme.title: Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Andy and the Chipmunk
programme.desc: Andy heads to Canada in his safari-mobile and meets a chipmunk collecting acorns.

programme.title: Sticks
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: The Island Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: Whistler Mountain, Canada
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Bird Migration: Spain & Africa
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.title: Shankar's Makeover
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: Bubble Bumbling
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: I Ate My House
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the fun stuff about where they live.

programme.title: It's time to visit the library
programme.desc: When JoJo runs out of story-books to read, she visits the Library with Gran Gran and gets her own library card! JoJo learns all about the Library and discovers how amazing it is!

programme.title: Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: The Tree Badge
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.title: The Big Day Out Badge
programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip.

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Whale Rescue
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps.

programme.title: Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: Washing

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'shark' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of sharks! There's a pointy nosed shark and a big fin shark, a speedy shark and a grey and white shark.

programme.title: Slippery Messy
programme.desc: OKIDO is covered in ice, and Messy must find a way to melt it before it's too late.

programme.title: Pow Tao

programme.title: Pass the Parcel

programme.title: Housework

programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Weather Prediction Predicament

programme.title: Shankar's Makeover
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Day 2: Australia vs Great Britain
programme.desc: 14 nations will battle it out for 7 spots in the finals in Shenzhen, China in the 63rd edition of the Billie Jean King Cup.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: FOTOGRAFER MUNDURAN DONG TAMPANNYA NIKUNG
programme.desc: Surti and Rudi’s first meeting is an absolute disaster. However, as they are forced to spend more time together, Surti wonders if her genuine sincerity is enough to turn their mutual annoyance into something meaningful.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Udah Paling Bener Nabrak Hati Ratu Jalanan
programme.desc: Tasya (Soraya Rasyid) is a beautiful girl who lives for the thrill of illegal street racing. One day, her gang's reckless stunt nearly injures one of Rendy’s (Bara Valentino) elementary students. Rendy, a dedicated teacher, confronts them in a heated argument, but the incident leads to him being unfairly fired by his principal. Now jobless and furious, Rendy blames Tasya and her gang for ruining his life

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Jarang Online Tapi On My Heart
programme.desc: Desperate to save her marriage after her husband Nada (Masaji Wijayanto) leaves, Melody visits a paranormal. She asks to 'trade in' her husband for a better version and go back to the past. The paranormal grants her wish, casting a spell that throws Melody into a time portal.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bukan Cuma Khodam, Love Tester Kita Juga Cocok
programme.desc: At the market, Rani (Aylena Fusil) buys coconut milk from Aris (Masaji Wijayanto), but a misunderstanding leads Aris to believe she hasn't paid. He chases her down for the money. Meanwhile, Rani's grandmother consults a psychic to find the perfect man for her granddaughter, leading to a fated encounter.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Definisi Mencintai Dalam Bacang
programme.desc: Thoriq (Cinta Brian), a handsome wonton vendor, reunites with his long-lost friend Aliyah (Jennifer Eve), who has returned from Germany with amnesia. It turns out her memory loss was caused by her ex, Beno, and his mistress, Cecil, who conspired to get her out of the way.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: GAK GITU KONSEPNYA MAEMUNAH
programme.desc: Maya’s (formerly Maemunah) arrogance leads to a bizarre curse: she suddenly reeks of salted fish, threatening to end her singing career! In a twist of fate, she meets Darto, a handsome salted-fish vendor. Could their meeting be the key to breaking the smelly curse and saving her voice?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maunya Jadian Sama Kamu Tapi Takut Dosa
programme.desc: Rosi (Rayna Snova) and Vino (Jeff Smith) broke up after Rosi’s mother accepted a bribe from Vino’s family to stay away. Years later, Vino is working as a 'ghost' in a night market haunted house. Unaware of the man behind the mask, Rosi pours her heart out to the 'ghost,' crying about how her ex cheated on her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ketemu di Mimpi is Level 34 of Kangen
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start after a breakup, Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) joins an 'open trip' where she meets Yudha (Rizky Nazar), the charming group leader. They share a romantic night stargazing in the forest, but Saskia wakes up in a hospital with a shock: the travel agency claims they have no record of anyone named Yudha

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.desc: A vampire terrifies the inhabitants of the small New England town of Jerusalem's Lot.

programme.desc: Bon Temps is rocked by a vicious attack by a band of rogue H-vamps.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: This dark comedy follows a father and daughter as they try and run their family business amongst a sea of morally grey choices.

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Robots
programme.desc: Exploring the provocative viewpoints of engineers, journalists and philosophers, this documentary examines more subtle but pervasive ways that robots affect humanity.

programme.title: Mondays At Racine
programme.desc: Inspired by their mother, a cancer victim, two sisters own a beauty salon in New York, which they open free of charge to cancer patients once a month on Mondays.

programme.title: Prime Minister
programme.desc: A view inside the life of former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern.

programme.title: Primo
programme.desc: In quiet but unsparing language, Primo Levi narrates the story of how he, an Italian-Jewish chemist, was captured by the Nazis and sent to Auschwitz.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Documentary centered on investigative reporter Ronan Farrow takes a deep dive into the growing spies-for-hire industry.

programme.title: Paterno
programme.desc: HBO Films’ PATERNO centres on Penn State’s Joe Paterno in the aftermath of the Jerry Sandusky sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The untold story of the Witches of Oz, spotlighting the untold stories of Oz's most infamous characters.

programme.title: Toxic Hot Seat
programme.desc: This HBO documentary looks at the nexus of money, politics and power - and a group of citizens as they fight to expose a campaign that has left a toxic legacy in America.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: King Richard follows the journey of Richard Williams, an undeterred father instrumental in raising two of the most extraordinarily gifted athletes of all time, who will end up changing the sport of tennis forever.

programme.title: Episode 10
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在七海伶婚礼后偶遇彧修明，表达了她想回到过去的愿望。借助云纹的帮助，她成功开启法阵回到了过去，并与七海蕊重逢。为了避免自己成为杀雪狼王的凶手，从而影响七海蕊的命运，叶凌霜将杀雪狼王的事情推给了彧修明。之后，她精心打扮并主动接近过去的彧修明，试图让他爱上自己，以便替代七海蕊出嫁。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 家朗翻找振强遗物，偶然发现一张与满月有关的闭路电视硬碟。满月对当年基俊称没有下迷药一事存疑，回看该片段也没发现，其后才知道漫星曾剪辑片段……满月从原片中得悉当年在咖啡下药的是一名穿高跟鞋的女人，还查出该限量版高跟鞋在香港只有一人买下，满月誓要找出这个始作俑者。满月成功令名作家方文帮昊天写自传，能力得到昊天认同。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】方欣公开录音，证明一妍加入明塱只为报仇。一妍被暂停职务，方欣顺利登上主席之位。丽雪因录音怀疑一妍是飞机失事的主谋，以珈却有所保留。原来志明的出现，全都是方欣的计划。一妍看似无法反击，只能听候医务会发落……永成拉拢方欣，成功加盟医疗城项目。新加坡首富魏孝棠让孙儿入住明塱医院，其孙儿要做心脏手术。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜和彧修明尝试通过时溯之廊回到过去改变历史，以拯救七海蕊，然而他们的行动并未能改变七海蕊的命运。七海蕊还是死在了战乱中，叶凌霜受到沉重打击。彧修明为了阻止叶凌霜再次尝试改变历史而破坏了时溯之廊，叶凌霜因此恨他。同时，朝堂上的斗争和运河工程的进展也牵动着众人的心，翼无忧和樊如晦为了各自的利益结成了联盟。

programme.title: Sleeping under the stars
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: The story of Anansi
programme.desc: Kongoue Bian seems to have become possessed by a spirit and hurls himself at Ebri Morrow intent on grabbing his purse. Pokou passes her final test. The High Priestess recounts the story of Anansi.

programme.title: The compact disk
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here's a cat
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Fumer Fait Tousser
programme.desc: Five justice fighters, the ''Tabac Force'', go on a retreat to strengthen their team cohesion. Until a sort of emperor of evil decides to wipe out the planet. Zany sketches, tight latex suits, DIY special effects, actors' performances: a bizarre gore fable but without toxicity!

programme.title: Au-Dela Des Murs
programme.desc: One morning, Lina is getting ready to go to Baumettes prison to attend her first visit. Nadjim, her boyfriend, has recently been imprisoned. Before leaving, she gathers things to take to him.

programme.title: La Confrontation
programme.desc: In a police station, Maxime, 17, is being questioned one last time today. Anxiety rises: she will soon have to face her greatest fear. Finding herself in the same room as the man who hurt her when she was a child, her godfather.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: September 1994. French President Francois Mitterrand had to manage a complicated cohabitation with Prime Minister edouard Balladur. The publication of a book by the journalist Pierre Pean, tracing his career under the Vichy government, forced the Head of State to justify himself to the French people.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel
programme.desc: On 3 November 1994, Francois Mitterrand saw the existence of his second family made official by ''Paris Match'' at the very moment when he was embroiled in the Elysee Palace bugging scandal. He considered these revelations as personal attacks by his opponents.

programme.title: The world of intelligence: the major players
programme.desc: The Hamas attack on 7 October 2023 exposed a major flaw in Israeli intelligence services. In a world where war is becoming hybrid, the challenges for secret services are immense. Their ability to inform, influence and manipulate is even one of the primary factors of power.

programme.title: Meurtres a Font-Romeu
programme.desc: Font-Romeu is in shock: Father Baptiste has been murdered. Lieutenant Thomas Errelbaz investigates, but is out of his depth. Newly arrived from Paris, his colleague Julie Delpech is struggling to assert her authority. But she is convinced that a mysterious individual is settling their scores with the past.

programme.title: Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord / Tuan Tran / Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: Returning to Kumassi
programme.desc: Pokou returns to Kumassi in a bubble with N'zi and Lucio. Ebri Morrow uses a spider's web to immobilise Kongoue Bian without getting close to him: he ties him up with the strands of the web and gradually draws him closer.

programme.title: The payment card
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here's a snail
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: The guardian angels of French heritage
programme.desc: From Burgundy to the Charente-Maritime, from Mont-Saint-Michel to the Chateau de Rambouillet, ''guardian angels'' work to restore French national heritage. Who are these craftsmen and women, committed to renovating the country's finest monuments and how do they organise their projects, work that is sometimes on a titanic scale?

programme.title: echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: Simon Reeve battles his way across the Congo, braving thick jungle and tropical swamps in search of the people and the wildlife who make their home in Africa's greatest rainforest.

programme.title: Romania
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: Japan

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在七海伶婚礼后偶遇彧修明，表达了她想回到过去的愿望。借助云纹的帮助，她成功开启法阵回到了过去，并与七海蕊重逢。为了避免自己成为杀雪狼王的凶手，从而影响七海蕊的命运，叶凌霜将杀雪狼王的事情推给了彧修明。之后，她精心打扮并主动接近过去的彧修明，试图让他爱上自己，以便替代七海蕊出嫁。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 家朗翻找振强遗物，偶然发现一张与满月有关的闭路电视硬碟。满月对当年基俊称没有下迷药一事存疑，回看该片段也没发现，其后才知道漫星曾剪辑片段……满月从原片中得悉当年在咖啡下药的是一名穿高跟鞋的女人，还查出该限量版高跟鞋在香港只有一人买下，满月誓要找出这个始作俑者。满月成功令名作家方文帮昊天写自传，能力得到昊天认同。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】方欣公开录音，证明一妍加入明塱只为报仇。一妍被暂停职务，方欣顺利登上主席之位。丽雪因录音怀疑一妍是飞机失事的主谋，以珈却有所保留。原来志明的出现，全都是方欣的计划。一妍看似无法反击，只能听候医务会发落……永成拉拢方欣，成功加盟医疗城项目。新加坡首富魏孝棠让孙儿入住明塱医院，其孙儿要做心脏手术。

programme.title: 逍遥

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜和彧修明尝试通过时溯之廊回到过去改变历史，以拯救七海蕊，然而他们的行动并未能改变七海蕊的命运。七海蕊还是死在了战乱中，叶凌霜受到沉重打击。彧修明为了阻止叶凌霜再次尝试改变历史而破坏了时溯之廊，叶凌霜因此恨他。同时，朝堂上的斗争和运河工程的进展也牵动着众人的心，翼无忧和樊如晦为了各自的利益结成了联盟。

programme.title: 头条开讲

programme.title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: Dr. Aarambhi
programme.desc: Once an AIPMT topper, Aarambhi's life is now weighed down by marital duties, but deep within her lies a long-lost dream. Will she get a second chance?

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi
programme.desc: Mangal embarks on a quest to find Lakshmi the perfect husband, showcasing the enduring strength of sisterhood, love, trials, and the power of destiny.

programme.title: Do Duniya Ek Dil
programme.desc: Shivaay bravely fights off goons to protect a life-saving injection for Aadhya. Days later, when Aadhya regains consciousness, Baldev is filled with guilt for the harm he caused her.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hanuman
programme.desc: Hanuman returns from Patal Loka and faces a mighty test as Ravan strikes with a deadly blow, unleashing astral demon heads that threaten the night.

programme.desc: Mahadev and his sons win the Best Parivaar award, but Bhanu insults Mahadev and Rajji before the ceremony, leaving Rajji hurt.

programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim’s secret under the pressure of cross examination.

programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she’s ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world.

programme.desc: A smug sales executive treks to Australia to improve regional sales and becomes embroiled in sexual and professional shenanigans.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Down Under

programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: 书剑恩仇录
programme.desc: 乾隆原来并非皇位继承人，而在出生时被调包，但他一直被蒙在鼓里，直至地下组织红花会的人相告。而红花会总舵主陈家洛是其同胞兄弟。两弟兄因身世和利益必需身不由己地彼此对抗...

programme.title: 人蛇鼠
programme.desc: 庄家农场独子庄士德海外归来，接手由胡麟管理的产业。胡一直与德之表妹曼玲勾结，图取庄家产业，并欲利用曼玲美色迷惑德！怎知在阿芬饲养的小蛇「西西」帮助下，反令德与芬结成夫妇。后来胡买来一条专咬人的野老鼠，欲将德之初生婴儿咬死，「西西」为救婴儿，与野鼠作殊死搏斗...

programme.title: 阿牛入城记
programme.desc: 这部喜剧描述乡下人阿牛来港后，因生性戆直而经常被坏人利用。阿牛尝尽低下层社会的人情冷暖，最后更被判入狱！究竟天生乐观的他，能否吉人天相？

programme.title: 春火
programme.desc: 杨国良是探长儿子，国良怪父沉迷工作，母离世仍在查案，隔膜顿生。国良遇上舞女梅琳，两人母亲皆殁，了解下迅即同居生活。国良因生活费花尽到俱乐部赌钱，被陈彪骗下巨款，更强奸梅琳。国良愤然杀死陈彪，遭警察围捕......

programme.title: 十八般武艺
programme.desc: 雷公为救弟子，不惜将他掌管的云南义和团分舵解散，并隐居乡间。义和团委派数名杀手追杀叛徒雷公，但反被雷公消灭。雷公的弟弟雷勇被派往先找出哥哥的下落，然后再将他杀死。最后，兄弟二人反目，决战定生死。

programme.title: 梁上君子
programme.desc: 本片为徐虾导演。 董骠, 钱小豪及蒋金饰扒手, 惟董失手被捕; 董出狱后装南洋阔客, 随钱及蒋返家, 因为想扮相古怪, 惹途人围观, 三人乘机施妙手, 更向盘问的保安队长罗莽自诩身份特殊, 使罗躬身谢罪...

programme.title: 黄飞鸿义取丁财炮
programme.desc: 申九蚣与黄飞鸿结怨后，设计陷害他及其弟子谋杀。幸得商人周立德相助，黄飞鸿才幸免于难，但他却要在舞狮会时抢得丁财炮以回报周立德。面对各路武林高手，黄飞鸿最终能否完成任务？

programme.title: 白发鬼
programme.desc: 年轻俊秀，生于名门望族的日籍华人林保，自幼失去父母，与大学好友川村感情深厚。二人都对美少女琉璃子心存爱慕，但川村自怜身世，不敢与林保争夺，林保顺利娶得琉璃子为妻。林保出国公干期间，川村和琉璃子耐不住寂寞，有了奸情。不久之后，林保竟在一次滑雪中意外身亡...

programme.title: 萧十一郎
programme.desc: 由楚原改编古龙小说及执导。伪君子天公子诱发萧十一郎与连城璧决斗，制造武林大乱，欲登上武林盟主之位。

programme.title: 茅山僵尸拳
programme.desc: 以「赶尸」为业的陈师父与徒弟受托押运九具僵尸，启程上路。未料途中两具竟逃脱。其中一具实际上并非僵尸，而是为躲避敌人追杀而假扮的江湖豪客。更令人意外的是，此人与陈师父同样身怀绝技，二人皆为深不可测的武林高手！

programme.title: 武林圣火令
programme.desc: 尹天仇的父母因一对武林圣火令﻿遭人暗算身亡，他和妹妹分别被忠奸两派收养抚育，兄妹各持一半圣火令，习得绝世武功。起初两人势同水火，却在揭开身世秘密后携手合作，共同为父母报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 小云雀
programme.desc: 记者仕泰为发掘歌星小云雀的秘密，假扮大亨接近小云雀。后来仕泰的假大亨身份被揭穿，小云雀大怒，请来真正大亨揭穿仕泰的身份。怎料大亨很欣赏仕泰的应变能力，实时聘请他为助手，处理歌星登台事宜。

programme.title: 满天神佛
programme.desc: 一次驱鬼时，青年术士鲁兴与友人因功力太差被女鬼戏弄险告丧命，幸得连大师施法帮助，才将女鬼驱逐。于是二人马上拜他为师。友人意外地被日本忍者所杀，鲁兴决定要学习绝世茅术，与大师一起对付残暴的忍者，因而引发终极乱斗！

programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: 妻子的浪漫旅行6
programme.desc: 一档以爱与理解为精神内核的夫妻对话真人秀。四对夫妻通过这趟旅行学习和借鉴其他夫妻的相处之道，让夫妻重新审视彼此关系，学会换位思考，达到治愈婚姻的目的。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理 7
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 大胃王来了4
programme.desc: 让人耳目一新的《大胃王来了4》开创台湾美食节目的新篇章！藉由大胃王们幸福地享用美食，让人看了食欲大开！

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黄路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 你比星光美丽
programme.desc: 该剧讲述了北漂女孩纪星（谭松韵饰）不甘于压抑内卷的职场生活，辞职走上艰苦创业之路，最终成功拉到投资人韩廷（许凯饰）入伙，二人在医疗与健康行业中携手共进。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: Bangkok
programme.desc: From meeting the "Queen of Bangkok Street Food" to eating Pad Thai at the place where it was born, Emeline lives a foodie’s dream in Bangkok.

programme.title: The Sculptures of Khajuraho, India
programme.desc: The Khajuraho group of temples have awed generations with their architectural brilliance, intricate carvings and their famous erotic sculptures.

programme.title: Porto, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek soaks in the old-world atmosphere of Porto and sets out to sample the city’s famous port wine.

programme.title: Trollhättan Trails
programme.desc: From epic waterfalls to hidden street art and one last party in Gothenburg - Robbie’s Swedish story ends with a cinematic splash.

programme.title: Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: In Rovaniemi, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits a husky farm, tries fishing with a local and participates in a curious Finnish tradition.

programme.title: Cork, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex explores Cork, starting with Fota Wildlife Park and then Blarney castle.

programme.title: Lampang
programme.desc: At an elephant conservation centre in Lampang, Emeline experiences the immense love that the Thai people feel for their national animal.

programme.title: Legacy of the Mughal Empire in Agra, India
programme.desc: The monuments of Agra and Fatehpur Sikri tell stories of the Mughal opulence and their love for the finer things in life.

programme.title: Cork, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex explores Cork, starting with Fota Wildlife Park and then Blarney castle.

programme.title: Santorini Greece
programme.desc: With its sea-drowned caldera, black-sand beaches and crimson sunsets, Santorini is the archetypal Greek island fantasy.

programme.title: Maldives Top 5 Things To Do
programme.desc: Here’s your cheat sheet to the most unique water-based experiences in the Maldives like feeding stingrays.

programme.title: Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi bakes cookies with Santa’s helpers in Elves village, in Levi. She also rides river rapids on a car inner tube..

programme.title: Londonderry, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex visits Peace bridge and explores Ness County by visiting Mussenden temple. Later tries blow-karting.

programme.title: Chiang Rai
programme.desc: While exploring the extraordinary temples in Chiang Rai, Emeline begins to uncover the stories hidden in their fascinating architecture.

programme.title: Amatra
programme.desc: Looking for a break from the chaos and stress of city life, Asmita decides to visit Haridwar, a place which she had last visited with her family.

programme.title: Baa Atoll, Maldives
programme.desc: Kirsty Nichol pampers herself with the spa treatments, adventures and Thai cuisine offered by Dusit Thani resort on Baa Atoll in Maldives.

programme.title: River Rafting In India
programme.desc: We have got the ultimate guide to India’s best white-water rafting spots, whether you’re a rookie or a river-riding pro!

programme.title: Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Through Finnish activities such as foraging and reindeer herding, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi learns about Sisu - the Finnish secret to happiness.

programme.title: Shangri La, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Koh Tao
programme.desc: Emeline visits Koh Tao - a small island in the Gulf of Thailand often referred to as a ‘diver’s paradise’.

programme.title: Hotel Ellbee, Hrishikesh
programme.desc: Travel lover Larissa D’Sa comes to Rishikesh looking for a relaxing getaway, and loses herself in its natural beauty.

programme.title: Hej Stockholm
programme.desc: Where cobblestone alleys meet disco lights - Robbie lands in Stockholm, a city that grooves to its own beat. The adventure kicks off in style.

programme.title: Chikhaldara,India
programme.desc: The mysteries and tales of Lonar Lake enthrall Krisann and Reanne.

programme.title: Wild Atlantic Way 3, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex continues his journey on Wild Atlantic Way and is in Kinsale. Starting with a heritage walk and ending with exploring the Kinnegar Brewery.

programme.title: El Tule, Mexico
programme.desc: Charlie shows the best ways to navigate the vibrant culinary scene of Mexico’s gastronomic capital, Oaxaca.

programme.title: Bengaluru
programme.desc: Are 48 hours enough for Shruti to make her friend, Yogita, fall in love with the city she fondly calls "Namma Bengaluru"?

programme.title: Lisbon, Portugal
programme.desc: From the tower of Belém to the Jeronimos Monastery, the sights of Lisbon narrate stories about Portugal’s maritime voyages of discovery.

programme.title: Kungsberget Rush
programme.desc: One rookie, one snowstorm, one giant slope - Robbie swaps city life for ski life in the wild winter playground of Kungsberget.

programme.title: Tadoba,India
programme.desc: What happens when Krisann and Reanne encounter a hungry tigress at Tadoba National Park?

programme.title: Wild Atlantic Way 1, Ireland
programme.desc: From the Cliffs of Moher to the Claddagh Arts Centre, Alex Drobin encounters many natural and cultural riches along Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.title: Villa del Carbón, Mexico
programme.desc: From greenery and culture to spiritual power, Charlie reveals the things that make some of Mexico’s towns ‘Pueblo Magicos’.

programme.title: Dubai
programme.desc: From bizarre theme parks to the world’s largest man-made marina, Sabrina Bussandri visits Dubai’s surreal attractions.

programme.title: Sintra, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek is mesmerized by the fairytale charms of Sintra with its turreted palaces, castle ruins and lavish mansions.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi explores the magnificent monuments and architecturally striking attractions of Helsinki.

programme.title: Ciudad de México, Mexico.
programme.desc: Enter Charlie Rubio: a bona fide Mexican, who is here to reveal all the wonderful things that make Mexico his favorite place in the world.

programme.title: Tashkent, Uzbekistan
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite visits the iconic city, Tashkent, and gets firsthand experience of its culture, food and people.

programme.title: Gotland Tales
programme.desc: Robbie steps into a fairytale on the island of Gotland - medieval walls, mysterious lagoons, and rugged beauty collide in this windswept wonderland.

programme.title: Wild Atlantic Way 2, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex explores Keem beach, visits Dooagh village and 6000 year old Ceide Fields. Next day, after breakfast, he explores Donegal.

programme.title: Coimbra, Portugal
programme.desc: From an ancient monastery and center of learning to one of the world’s oldest universities, welcome to Coimbra, Portugal’s university town.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi explores the magnificent monuments and architecturally striking attractions of Helsinki.

programme.title: 风流冤鬼
programme.desc: 红歌女阿花遭大户陶老爷奸杀，陶宅即常闹鬼，后陶老爷亦神秘死亡。陶之后人陶明嗜赌如命，更因鬼魂作怪而欠下钜款。明妻暗中将陶宅售予杨教授夫妇，即遇上怪事连篇...

programme.title: 黑白潜行2
programme.desc: 在莱咖国政权交替之际，黑帮头目宋邦企图藉此洗白身份，欲坐上市长宝座。为了筹措庞大资金，他与官员勾结行贿，却仍面临严重的资金缺口。于是，宋邦的得力助手郑咤和打手苏万杀人越货、横行作恶，逐步帮助他巩固权力。正当宋邦自以为能坐享其成时，三人的关系却突然逆转...

programme.title: 夜守
programme.desc: 在一次车祸后失忆的王人杰找到夜间警卫的工作。午夜，他准时抵达废弃的大厦上班，却发现三只冤魂如约而至，并揭发了一场复仇计画。究竟这是命运的安排还是邪灵的诅咒？

programme.title: 裂战
programme.desc: 为了对抗温室效应，女科学家颜欣培育出超级橡胶种子，前往一个荒岛进行种植，希望将那里改变为一片欣欣向荣的新土地。然而，她的前夫决定在这趟危险的旅程中保护她，与她结伴同行。抵达后，他们面临接连不断的冲突，并遇上当地的贩毒组织，一场生死对决随即展开。

programme.title: 窥情
programme.desc: 波子一夜用望远镜窥看家邻近四周时，揭发了一宗命案。但经警方调查村内居民，包括富商情妇Rita、邮差、纸店主老王及其妻子等人，揭开彼此间错综复杂的情欲关系之同时，还是不知谁是受害人，谁是凶手... 于是，波子决定用自己的方法继续调查...

programme.title: 我的野蛮同学
programme.desc: 在一间Band5学校有个打擂台的传统，学生会在课室将很多张书桌拼成一个擂台，在擂台上进行决胜去解决一切争执。四个性格各异的少年石头、Edward、亚凤、Seven意外地成为朋友，共同经历了难忘的成长体验...

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: 韩城攻略
programme.desc: 特工林贵仁隶属日本国防外务科特别侦缉组，他与一名飞贼联手，试图窃取两块美金伪钞电版。然而，当电版被美国大使馆人员盗走并带到韩国后，整个事件变得更加复杂棘手。

programme.title: 珠光宝气
programme.desc: 一名商人的私生女，无意中擦出神仙阿宝，并得到三个愿望。可惜阿宝法术不精，而发生了很多啼笑皆非的事。

programme.title: 缘份
programme.desc: 一个刚毕业的年青人在地铁站内邂逅一个美丽动人的女子，并对她一见钟情。在另一方面，他正被一个富家女展开追求。而此时他倾心的那女子，也正周旋于一个已婚男子之中。当那年青人向她表白时，那女子要求与他在地铁站内玩捉迷藏来决定大家的缘份！

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 摩登仙履奇缘
programme.desc: 陈七是职业惯匪，偷呃拐骗无所不为，但从不使用暴力；张曼珠是电视台新晋演员，收入微薄，生活拮据。一次偶然中，陈得到了一枚巨钻，欲找买家脱手，却遇杀手追杀，情急下将巨钻藏于某鞋店的一只高跟鞋内，后来，此鞋刚好被张买去参加舞会......

programme.title: 除恶: 飞车党
programme.desc: 本片由真实事件改编，刑警林岩成立专队对付佛山飞车抢夺案的飞车大盗及幕后犯罪集团。过程中，林岩怀孕的妻子被飞车大盗撞到，继而揭发他们犯罪背后的复仇计划...

programme.title: 替身纸人
programme.desc: 警方在调查一宗团伙杀人案时，突然又发生了离奇的纸人杀人事件，嫌疑人一个接一个的被杀。随着不断挖出的线索，警方最终发现这背后隐藏着横跨两代人的秘密与悲剧。

programme.title: 鹿鼎记
programme.desc: 韦小宝被反清复明的"天地会"被派到皇宫当卧底，受命查探四十二章经下落。韦小宝很快成为康熙皇帝的心腹，但他既要执行天地会的任务，最后陷入两难的状态。

programme.title: 惊心妒怨
programme.desc: 女模特余虹敏入住了一间公寓式医院，不久后在深夜离奇坠楼身亡。坊间开始流传该医院是「幽灵医院」。事后，余虹敏的摄影师在深夜频频接到诡异电话，撰稿人在一场离奇车祸后神志不清，而她的好友则神秘失踪...

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 圣山村迷局
programme.desc: 平静的圣山村发生了一系列神秘事件，原本该下葬的尸体突然复活，而且拔足狂跑。全村马上展开追查行动，但这时村中恶霸却意外死亡，村长也失踪。于是警察接手调查，但当谜底快要解开时，村干部却又有惊天大发现。到底谁是幕后真凶？

programme.title: 歼毒先锋
programme.desc: 退役军人吴巍和卧底刑警高天明带领特别行动小组勇闯近曼谷的孤岛，从暴徒手中救出人质。但在完成任务并准备离岛之际，吴巍发现自己的女儿被对方胁持。为救女儿及将犯罪分子绳之以法，吴巍和高天明重回危险境地，与暴徒进行了惨烈的对决。

programme.title: 夜迷藏
programme.desc: 电影由三个恐怖短故事组成：一个男人收到死神通报后，设法避过死亡；男人因心爱的妻子去世后伤心欲绝，他的妻子变成鬼魂与他通灵；三兄弟在一次晚餐聚会上为照顾年迈母亲的问题而争吵，最后竟变成一宗可怕的谋杀案。

programme.title: 多乐路
programme.desc: 东北某小城，一家麻辣汤馆每天都迎来不同的客人。这些客人中有如胶似漆的小情侣，两名放荡不羁的青年和一位的士司机。他们本是毫无交集的人，却因为一场交通事故牵扯在一起...

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: 法中情
programme.desc: 摄影师田迪文强奸模特儿凌祖儿，幸得大律师叶颖文洗脱控罪。颖文男友高级督察方伟负责此案，不满女友是非不分。祖儿之妹凌珊珊替姐报仇，反遭田施暴，颖文再任其辩护律师。珊珊因过往不良纪录，处处失利，能够令田入罪的机会极微；检控官决定请师兄龙约翰出山相助。

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 天官赐福
programme.desc: 康熙少年嗣位，太后急欲替他完婚，遂选纳大臣之女纳兰琼瑶为妃，但琼瑶为争取婚姻自由离家出走，康熙亦乐得不用成婚。后来康熙微服下江南，却偶遇女扮男装的琼瑶...

programme.title: 头文字 D
programme.desc: 本片由日本同名殿堂级漫画改编而成。故事描述十八岁的拓海，每天驾驶着父亲残旧的汽车送递豆腐，却无意中练得一手出神入化的飘移技术。拓海被父亲怂恿参加山路赛，竟在众人错愕之下胜出，一夜成名，之后更面对一连串惊险绝伦的挑战赛！

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 妻子的浪漫旅行6
programme.desc: 一档以爱与理解为精神内核的夫妻对话真人秀。四对夫妻通过这趟旅行学习和借鉴其他夫妻的相处之道，让夫妻重新审视彼此关系，学会换位思考，达到治愈婚姻的目的。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理 7
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 大胃王来了4
programme.desc: 让人耳目一新的《大胃王来了4》开创台湾美食节目的新篇章！藉由大胃王们幸福地享用美食，让人看了食欲大开！

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 你比星光美丽
programme.desc: 该剧讲述了北漂女孩纪星（谭松韵饰）不甘于压抑内卷的职场生活，辞职走上艰苦创业之路，最终成功拉到投资人韩廷（许凯饰）入伙，二人在医疗与健康行业中携手共进。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: Side-Swiped / Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol / Pups Save a Lost Tooth
programme.desc: Impressed by the Paw Patrol's rescues, Alex sets up his own mini-Patrol, recruitng Chickaletta, Cali, Turtle, and Bunny. // Alex loses his first tooth, then really loses it.The tooth must be located before the Tooth Fairy comes!

programme.title: Pups Save Apollo / Pups Save the Hippos
programme.desc: Apollo the Super Pup comes to Adventure Bay, in Rubble's dream. The pups must rescue their super hero! // Raimundo's dancing hippos shake, rattle, and roll the big top down. The Paw Patrol rebuild just in time for the big show!

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: The Royal Fairy Picnic / Gaston the Ladybird
programme.desc: Holly invites Ben on the annual Royal Fairy Picnic. King Thistle hopes there won't be a repeat of last year's jelly flood. // Holly and Ben try to cheer up Gaston by tidying his cave. But Gaston liked his cave just as it was, all messy and untidy.

programme.title: Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Roadtrip
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Space Show
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: The Blaze Family
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are spending the day with some very special trucks: Blaze's family! His Mom, Dad, and little sister Sparkle join Blaze in a race against Crusher to prove they're the world's fastest family!

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Blaze's First Race
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends remember their first ever race together, back when they were little monster machines with BIG dreams of becoming racers!

programme.title: Space Mission Blaze
programme.desc: When three of Blaze's friends get launched into outer space on out-of-control jetpacks, Astronauts Blaze and AJ must blast off to save them!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whirly Playground
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: Pups Save the Wacky Water Skiers / Pups Save the Mayor's Assistant
programme.desc: When Emmy and Eddie take a joyride, Hurricane Harrigan and Cap'n Turbot get caught water skiing behind the out of- control boat. // Daring Danny X becomes Mayor Humdinger's assistant, and builds a theme park! A jealous Humdinger sabotages the rides.

programme.title: Pups Save a High-Flying Hen / Pups Save a Sloth
programme.desc: After Chickaletta accidentally takes flight on a toy airplane, it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue her. // Mayor Humdinger mistakes a sloth for a monkey. He races the Paw Patrol to find it when it goes missing to cover up his blunder.

programme.title: Crabby Wedding / The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: Roadtrip
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.

programme.title: Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: Talent Show
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Windy Castle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the Windy Castle, and when they get there, they have a wonderful view from the top.

programme.title: My Cousin Chloe
programme.desc: Peppa and George's cousin Chloe comes to their house. Peppa tries to show Chloe that she is a big girl, but it is very hard.

programme.title: Pancakes
programme.desc: Mummy Pig makes pancakes, and Peppa and George help, but Daddy Pig flips his pancake so high it sticks to the ceiling.

programme.title: Babysitting
programme.desc: Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig look after Peppa and George while Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go out for the evening. Peppa and George are too excited to sleep and Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig play games with them to tire them out.

programme.title: Holly's Magic Wand / The Elf Farm
programme.desc: Holly needs her wand to do magic. When she loses it, Ben has to use his elf skills to find it. // Holly goes with Ben and Mr Elf to the Elf Farm. While there, a huge chicken escapes and Holly and the elves have to chase it across the Little Kingdom.

programme.title: The Tenderest Bond of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: It's Only a Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: Abra-Ka-Pickle!
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: Toy Trouble!
programme.desc: The Axle City toy store has an amazing machine that can make any toy you want! But when Crusher uses it, he makes giant toys that run amok! Only Blaze and Watts can stop the giant toys from making a giant mess!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: Pups Save Big Hairy / Pups Save a Flying Kitty
programme.desc: Pups need to lure a big ape onto the PAW Patroller so they can take him back to the jungle. // Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down.

programme.title: Pups Save a Freaky Pup-Day / Pups Save a Runaway Mayor
programme.desc: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay. // Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

programme.title: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: The Camping Holiday
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are on holiday in their trailer van. They decide to go to Duck Land, a special park where they can see the ducks in the river, and are surprised when they learn that their van can convert into a boat!

programme.title: Compost
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Worms inside the bin turn the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Richard Rabbit Comes to Play
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, and Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa! The boys and girls don't want to play the same games, but they all like jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Fun Run
programme.desc: Daddy Pig finds it hard work when he runs a race to raise money for the school roof, but it's easier to run when a wasp is chasing him!

programme.title: Washing
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in too - which turns Daddy's shirt pink!

programme.title: Polly's Boat Trip
programme.desc: Peppa and George go boating with Grandpa Pig and Polly Parrot, but later Grandpa Pig drops his mobile phone into the water.

programme.title: Holly's Magic Wand / The Elf Farm
programme.desc: Holly needs her wand to do magic. When she loses it, Ben has to use his elf skills to find it. // Holly goes with Ben and Mr Elf to the Elf Farm. While there, a huge chicken escapes and Holly and the elves have to chase it across the Little Kingdom.

programme.title: Pups Save a Robosaurus / Pups Save a Film Festival
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. // The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Pups Save the Treetop Trekkers
programme.desc: Ms. Marjorie, Tilly Turbot, and Mayor Goodway get stranded in the treetops on their jungle zip-lining adventure.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.title: Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy formerly of the Star Trek series and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: Reparations
programme.desc: Jonah Dekker comes to NYC from L.A. to defend his cousin who has been accused of rape. Meanwhile, ADA Casey Novak returns to help Benson and Stabler with the case.

programme.title: Prime Time
programme.desc: When the Tanners become a Nielsen family, ALF rigs the people meter to "skew up" the ratings of his favorite shows--which causes havoc for NBC's President Brandon Tartikoff.

programme.title: Part I
programme.desc: A sinister force lurks menacingly behind the warm visage of Pennywise the Clown, who awakens every thirty years, altering reality to animate victims' greatest fears in Stephen King's IT.

programme.title: Lines Of Excellence
programme.desc: Jessica accidentally discovers a case of computer tapping which leads to murder when she trades in her manual typewriter for a computer.

programme.title: The Controllers (Part 1)
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy formerly of the Star Trek series and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: A Dump Of My Own
programme.desc: Al sets out to fulfill a lifelong dream when he begins construction on his very own bathroom, equipped with the legendary Ferguson Toilet.

programme.title: The Corsican Cousins
programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: Part 12
programme.desc: The war is over, the Confederacy having surrendered, freeing the slaves. But most people seem interested only in using and abusing the emancipated blacks in the same old way.

programme.title: Reparations
programme.desc: Jonah Dekker comes to NYC from L.A. to defend his cousin who has been accused of rape. Meanwhile, ADA Casey Novak returns to help Benson and Stabler with the case.

programme.title: Some Enchanted Evening
programme.desc: At ALF's urging, Willie hosts a Halloween costume party to impress his boss and get a better job. ALF decides to invite everyone to the scary bash becomes the celebrated figure of the evening.

programme.title: Judge Not
programme.desc: Jessica attends the New Orleans funeral of a jazz musician and attempts to solve a 20-year-old murder that is haunting his family.

programme.title: Terminal Connection
programme.desc: Jessica attempts to prove a battered wife innocent of killing her husband after failing to convince the woman to defend herself.

programme.title: Part 12
programme.desc: The war is over, the Confederacy having surrendered, freeing the slaves. But most people seem interested only in using and abusing the emancipated blacks in the same old way.
