programme.title: The Controllers (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jim Phelps lets himself be framed for murder in a scheme to discredit a scientist who has developed a mind-destroying drug in the second of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Her Cups Runneth Over
programme.desc: Peggy is so miserable when her favorite bra is discontinued, that Al is forced to take matters into his own hands and find a replacement.

programme.title: Samantha's Magic Potion
programme.desc: Samantha stirs up an impotent potion to get Darrin to stir up creative juices of his own.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: Cool Change
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: Bang
programme.desc: When an abandoned baby is found on playground, Detectives Benson (Hargitay) and_x000D_Stabler (Meloni) go in search of the child's caregiver.

programme.title: Mutiny At Nugget Creek
programme.desc: Dustin risks the lives of his entire crew at a deadly waterfall. But an all-out mutiny changes the course of his season.

programme.title: Dive Hard With A Vengeance
programme.desc: After the raging storm, Ken learns the Myrtle Irene's fate. Shawn uses a new tool to hunt for new hotspots. Emily brings on a new crew member from her past.

programme.title: Italy Fiat Barchetta
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turin and set about trying to rescue a rundown Fiat Barchetta. Unfortunately, parts prove almost impossible to find.

programme.title: Ready, Claim, Fire
programme.desc: Tensions fly as Brad leads The Reaper into hostile waters where Emily defends Claim 14 from claim jumpers. Shawn hunts an elusive pay-streak.

programme.title: Alien Sharks Ghosts Of Japan
programme.desc: Expert Forrest Galante and a team of shark scientists uncover whether the critically endangered Japanese angel shark remains in Japan's waters.

programme.title: Germany AUDI Rs2
programme.desc: The guys take a huge risk buying a neglected Audi RS2 that they can't test drive. Will this high-performance estate car turn into a €40k money pit?

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Forest fires threaten to shut down Parker's Sulphur Creek claim before he can get all the gold out.

programme.title: When Parker Met Rick
programme.desc: Rick Ness takes a job working on 16-year-old Parker Schnabel's gold mine. The two miners form a strong bond, bringing in millions in gold.

programme.title: Gold Is Thicker Than Blood
programme.desc: Shawn confronts his dad for the sake of the family operation -- to disastrous results. Emily brings her father aboard The Eroica.

programme.title: Alien Sharks Ghosts Of Japan
programme.desc: Expert Forrest Galante and a team of shark scientists uncover whether the critically endangered Japanese angel shark remains in Japan's waters.

programme.title: Italy Fiat Barchetta
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis travel to Turin and set about trying to rescue a rundown Fiat Barchetta. Unfortunately, parts prove almost impossible to find.

programme.title: Vermont Timber Frame House
programme.desc: A couple with a passion for snowboarding build a cabin in Vermont. Can they finish this ambitious build before the harsh New England winter hits?

programme.title: The Cowboy Challenge The Great Trek
programme.desc: Does Otto have what it takes to be a cowboy? In California, he reveals what he's learned and leads nearly 200 cattle across the prairie.

programme.title: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Drowning in debt, Jared fights to keep his business afloat and his workers employed when 'fowl play' threatens to sink his float camp.

programme.title: Tricks Of The Mine
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan expose the truth behind the pitfalls of gold-hungry miners they've encountered over the years.

programme.title: High Stakes Hustle
programme.desc: After a week lost to stormy weather, the fleet scrambles to make up for lost time in innovative ways.

programme.title: Malta Ford Cortina
programme.desc: Having wanted to buy a Ford Cortina for 20 years, Mike finally finds a rust-free Mk2 in Malta. Unfortunately, the rest of the car is a complete mess.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Stranded 9000 feet above sea level in the snow covered Rocky Mountains, Cody and Joe battle hypothermia and stay alive long enough.

programme.title: The Center Of Africa River Cruise Into The Unknow
programme.desc: Otto heads to the Congo River using a dugout canoe. As civil war rages in the region, an encounter with armed militia could have fatal consequences.

programme.title: Stranded
programme.desc: Jared needs to move $1,000,000 of wood down a treacherous river to market. But they can't find anyone brave enough to lead the journey.

programme.title: Alabama Arch House
programme.desc: A young family plan to build their forever home in Alabama. Can they complete this challenging build during the peak of hurricane season?

programme.title: No Sleep Till Petersburg
programme.desc: The Brown siblings battle boat issues while racing to meet a deadline. And, Bam strives to save the ranch money by learning from a local hay farmer.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: Episode 1
